description.value: Your fervently religious approach to acquiring information gives you insights and understanding into a broad array of subjects. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Additional Lore] skill feat. During your daily preparations, you can recontextualize your insights and change the chosen Lore skill for any of your Additional Lore skill feats, unless they're being used as a prerequisite for a permanent character option that your new Lore skill won't satisfy.

value.value: legendary in one or more Lore skills, follower of Yaraesa
